allow: Bash(awk '/^COMMIT$/{if\(length\(a\)>1\){for\(i in a\)for\(j in a\)if\(i<j\)print a[i]"|"a[j]};delete a;next}{a[$0]=$0}END{if\(length\(a\)>1\)for\(i in a\)for\(j in a\)if\(i<j\)print a[i]"|"a[j]}')

Bash(awk 'BEGIN{n=0} /^---/{ if\(n>1\){ for\(i=0;i<n;i++\) for\(j=i+1;j<n;j++\) print arr[i] "  vs  " arr[j] }; n=0; next } /^R\\//{ arr[n++]=$0 } END{ if\(n>1\){ for\(i=0;i<n;i++\) for\(j=i+1;j<n;j++\) print arr[i] "  vs  " arr[j] } }' /tmp/cochange.txt)
